steps.title: Locate the requested column
steps.content: The sentence asks for the depth with the highest number of tools made from clamshells collected from the beach. In the table, that means reading the beach-collected column and finding its maximum value.

steps.title: Use the maximum row
steps.content: The largest beach-collected count is 99, and it appears in the 3-4 meters row. A, B, and D point to rows with fewer beach-collected tools, so they do not complete the statement accurately. The answer is C.
